data.title: Kane County Economic Development Corporation Appoints Michael Cassa as Chief Commercial Officer
data.description: In Batavia, Illinois, the Kane County Economic Development Corporation (KCEDC) has named Michael Cassa as its first Chief Commercial Officer. The appointment aims to enhance business-led growth and bolster Kane County's appeal for investment, expansion, and site selection. With previous experience as CEO of public/private partnerships in Downers Grove and Oswego, Cassa also served as the Economic Development Director. This move signifies a strategic effort by KCEDC to boost competitiveness under Cassa’s leadership.

data.title: BigID Extends Data Access Governance to AI Agents
data.description: BigID has recently enhanced its Data Access Governance (DAG) and Data Access Management (DAM) capabilities, introducing identity controls, least-privilege enforcement, and real-time activity monitoring for non-human AI entities. The announcement was made in San Francisco on March 25, 2026. This expansion will provide heightened security measures to ensure data protection, with the implementation of these features across a wider range of systems.

data.title: MFour Adds Another 1M+ ChatGPT Conversations in February, Extending Full Consumer Journey Visibility
data.description: For the second month in a row, there have been over 1 million LLM conversations voluntarily engaged in, enhancing the industry's unique end-to-end perspective from AI suggestions to actual purchases. The milestone was achieved in Irvine, California on March 25, 2026 by MFour Data Research, Inc., a leading supplier of primary consumer data.

data.title: Supporting Schools and Nonprofits as They Deliver Financial Education
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, Ferguson Wellman Capital Management, an employee-owned investment firm, is observing Financial Literacy Month in April by reaffirming its dedication to promoting financial education in the Pacific Northwest. The firm is supporting this initiative by providing access to their 15 DollarSense videos, which now feature three new topics aimed at volunteers on nonprofit boards. This effort aligns with Oregon Senate Bill-3, which mandates two semesters of financial education.

data.title: In HelloNation, Criminal Defense Attorney John B. Seed Explains What Happens After a First DUI or OUI Charge
data.description: In Massachusetts, drivers who receive a first OUI charge should be aware of the legal procedures, deadlines, and repercussions they may face. HelloNation recently provided guidance on what individuals can anticipate following an initial OUI charge in the state. This includes important information on the necessary steps to take, crucial timelines to adhere to, and potential consequences that may ensue. It serves as a valuable resource for those navigating the complexities of dealing with a first OUI offense in Massachusetts.

data.title: Nitradyn, LLC appoints explosives executive as President
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on March 25, 2026, Nitradyn, LLC, an energetic manufacturer, announced the appointment of Braden Lusk as its first President. Lusk, a seasoned explosives executive, expressed his pride in bringing his vast technical expertise to the position. The company aims to benefit from Lusk’s experience in the industry to drive growth and innovation.

data.title: Convergence Networks Acquires Certinet Systems, Expanding Pacific Northwest Presence and Strengthening Security Capabilities in Regulated Industries
data.description: In Yakima, Washington and Portland, Oregon, on March 25, 2026, Convergence Networks, a top Managed Service Provider in North America, revealed the acquisition of Certinet Systems, an IT services company based in Yakima. Certinet Systems is recognized for its excellent customer connections. This acquisition marks a significant move that combines the strengths of both companies and increases Convergence Networks' reach in the market.

data.title: Noah Reports Q4 and Full Year 2025 Earnings: Structural Transformation Driving Significant Improvement in Profitability as AI Integration Drives Operational Efficiency
data.description: In the fourth quarter, there was a notable 12.5% increase in net revenues compared to the previous year, and a significant sequential growth of 15.9%. This growth was mainly propelled by the expansion of global asset allocation and investment capabilities. The profitability structure saw a substantial improvement, with income from operations rising by an impressive 87.3% year-over-year during the period.

data.title: Tether introduces BitNet LoRA, allowing AI training on smartphones with 78% less VRAM usage than standard models. (Learn more)
data.description: Tether has introduced the BitNet LoRA framework which allows for the fine-tuning of AI models on consumer devices. This new technology reduces VRAM usage significantly, with reductions of up to 78% compared to conventional models. This innovation paves the way for more efficient and streamlined AI processes on personal devices, offering a significant improvement in performance.
